page_content:
HESP888 Seminar in Neurological Bases of Language (3 Credits) Neural ststrates of language function, brain image of normal and disordered language function, and neural plasticity for language. Restriction: Must be in one of the following programs (Hearing and Speech Sciences: Ph.D. (Doctoral); Clinical Audiology: Au.D. or Ph.D. (Doctoral); Hearing and Speech Sciences: M.A. (Master's)) ; and permission of instructor. Repeatable to: 6 credits if content differs.

HESP889 Doctoral Candidacy Research (1-3 Credits) Doctoral candidacy paper research Restriction: Must be in one of the following programs (Hearing and Speech Sciences: Ph.D. (Doctoral); Clinical Audiology: Au.D. or Ph.D. (Doctoral)) ; and permission of instructor. Repeatable to: 6 credits if content differs.
